heading: Citizenship or noncitizen nationality
label: 7102 Citizenship or noncitizen nationality
text: Licenses and certificates of registry for individuals on documented vessels may be issued only to citizens or noncitizen nationals (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ()) of the United States.8 U.S.C. 1408
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)710246:24246:1132(a)Section 7102 requires that any individual issued a license or certificate of registry allowing the individual to be engaged on a documented vessel must be a U.S. citizen.

Amendments2025— inserted “or noncitizen nationality” after “Citizenship” in section catchline and “or noncitizen nationals (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ())” after “citizens” in text.Pub. L. 119–608 U.S.C. 1408
amendments: Amendments2025— inserted “or noncitizen nationality” after “Citizenship” in section catchline and “or noncitizen nationals (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ())” after “citizens” in text.Pub. L. 119–608 U.S.C. 1408
